notes: Ported from the original Cashiro AdelFiParser.kt (parser-core/src/main/kotlin/com/ritesh/parser/core/bank/AdelFiParser.kt). AdelFi Credit Union (USA) sends alerts from short code 42141 in the form: "Transaction Alert from AdelFi.\n**1234 had a transaction of ($15.00). Description: 8042999971 MERCHANT NAME CITY CAUS. Date: Dec 19, 2025" The Kotlin parser classifies every alert as CREDIT (credit-union card transactions) and strips the leading numeric reference off the description.

fixtures.name: transaction - tax service
fixtures.body:
Transaction Alert from AdelFi.
**1234 had a transaction of ($15.00). Description: 8042999971 P AND F TAX INC        CITY        CAUS. Date: Dec 19, 2025

fields.merchant: P AND F TAX INC CITY CAUS
